title: Hyper Skeleton
description: This is a small mod for adding a Hyper Skeleton. It is similar to the one that Karat Feng uses in his MMB - Minecraft Mob Battles.
body:
![HyperSkeletonBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48fa3f134ef2c7fd12b5f1b0db9134fde3142442.png)
This mod adds a **Hyper Skeleton** similair to the one Karat Feng uses in his MMB - Minecraft Mob Battles.

Currently this is just the Hyper Skeleton that wonders around killing pretty much anything. Additionaly the **Hyper Skeleton** is a day walker so be careful in survival worlds >>--->

![Hyper Skeleton firing arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36178abe189eb02ee9364771c745e020f5b809ce.png)

![Hyper Skeleton pile of arrows left behind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f22616444bf57a6013e8df6d0e64a077ed97344.png)

**Geckolib is required.**
